title: Rankett.com landing — Phase 01: tracking visibility
html:
Public Rankett marketing site (rankett.com) showing the Phase-01 hero: "Your logo, your domain, our engine. Your AI Visibility Audit Tool." Sells the audit tool as a lead-magnet/discovery/upsell with ChatGPT + Anthropic icons in the headline. Bullets: AI Visibility Score & Mention Rate, gap analysis (missing schema, FAQs, authority mentions), exportable PDF audits for sales decks, automatic email capture for leads. Nav: Process / Features / Pricing / FAQ / Login.

TL;DR

  • Rankett's public site frames the product as agency lead-magnet infrastructure, not end-user SaaS.
  • Hero copy "Your logo, your domain, our engine" is the ghost white label one-liner.
  • Feature bullets confirm ai visibility engine: scores, gap analysis (schema/FAQ/authority), PDF exports, lead capture.

rankett · ghost white label · ai visibility engine · schema markup for ai · chatgpt · anthropic claude
